user_query: I'm planning a surprise birthday party for my best friend and I want to organize a horse racing-themed event. Can you find me a race happening on their birthday and provide me with the race details? It would also be helpful to have a list of nearby venues where we can host the party.

TaskList.description: Search for horse racing events happening on the specified birthday.
Retrieve detailed information about the identified horse racing event.
Find venues that can host a birthday party near the horse racing event location.
